messages.content:
I _____ chips and dip to the Super Bowl party.

will brought
bring
will bring
I will bring chips and dip to the Super Bowl party.

Last week, Glen _____ with us about her great experience with the leadership training.

speaking
spoke
speak
Last week, Glen spoke with us about her great experience with the leadership training.

A photographer _____ out to our house the day after next to take pictures of my mother’s flowers.

will come
went
has come
A photographer will come out to our house the day after next to take pictures of my mother’s flowers.

Did you _____ the timer to let us know when the chicken is done?

setting
set
Did you set the timer to let us know when the chicken is done?

Samson _____ that the bus comes at 8:45 sharp every day, so he needs to leave his house by 8:00 at the latest.

learning
learned
learn
Samson learned that the bus comes at 8:45 sharp every day, so he needs to leave his house by 8:00 at the latest.

We were _____ dinner last night when my phone rang.

eating
eat
eaten
We were eating dinner last night when my phone rang.

According to the itinerary, he will be _____ in Massachusetts a little after 6:00 P.M.

arrived
arrive
arriving
According to the itinerary, he will be arriving in Massachusetts a little after 6:00 P.M.

Whitney is _____ her name on her lunch in the refrigerator this week, after sandwich went missing the other day.

marked
marking
mark
Whitney is marking her name on her lunch in the refrigerator this week, after her sandwich went missing the other day.

Did you know that the company is _____ the use of nonrecycled materials in its packaging?

stop
stopped
stopping
Did you know that the company is stopping the use of nonrecycled materials in its packaging?

By the time the play is over, we will have _____ at the stadium for more than three hours.

be
been
being
By the time the play is over, we will have been at the stadium for more than three hours.

When I _____ with my grandmother, I always learn something new.

baking
baked
bake
When I bake with my grandmother, I always learn something new.

Once Clive takes this final exam, he will _____ completed his MBA degree.

having
has
have
Once Clive takes this final exam, he will have completed his MBA degree.

Ferris is _____ handmade invitations for her birthday.

made
making
make
Ferris is making handmade invitations for her birthday.

We _____ an astronomical amount of money to see the Ariana Grande in concert, but we had so much fun that it was worth it.

pay
paying
paid
We paid an astronomical amount of money to see Ariana Grande in concert, but we had so much fun that it was worth it.

He has _____ such a good impression in his first few months here that the managers already want to promote him to the next level.

make
made
making
He has made such a good impression in his first few months here that the managers already want to promote him to the next level.

In the photo, Norris _____ to block the shot as Rolf launches the basketball toward the basket.

jumping
jumps
jumped
In the photo, Norris is jumping to block the shot as Rolf launches the basketball toward the basket.

Thanks to the company’s online system, I will _____ my package from the warehouse to my door.

tracked
tracking
track
Thanks to the company’s online system, I will track my package from the warehouse to my door.

Donald will _____ with his boss for a raise, due to his strong sales performance in the past year.

negotiated
negotiating
negotiate
Donald will negotiate with his boss for a raise, due to his strong sales performance in the past year.

Rumor has it that the ghost of Old Mr. Warwick has _____ that house on the corner for more than 75 years.

haunting
haunted
haunt
Rumor has it that the ghost of Old Mr. Warwick has haunted that house on the corner for more than 75 years.

When Sally and Talia's cat didn’t come home for three days, they _____ the neighborhood with flyers and pictures of Snuffles in the hope that someone would recognize the cat and bring it home.

paper
papering
papered
When Sally and Talia's cat didn’t come home for three days, they papered the neighborhood with flyers and pictures of Snuffles in the hope that someone would recognize the cat and bring it home.
